title: PageDescriptor
description: Describes a UI page bound to an entity

name.description: Unique URL-safe identifier for the page

title.description: Display title for the menu item and page header

entityName.description: Full name of the root entity this page displays (e.g., 'Namespace.EntityName')

groupByProperty.description: Property name to group entities by (required for kanban). Must reference an enum property.

order.description: Menu sort order (lower values appear first)

formName.description: Name of the form to render (required when type is 'form')

createFormName.description: Name of the form to use for creating entities (for dataGrid/kanban pages)

editFormName.description: Name of the form to use for editing entities (for dataGrid/kanban pages)

createFormDisplay.description: How to display the create form

editFormDisplay.description: How to display the edit form
